mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_external_review_receipt ( receipt_id, tenant_id, project_id, review_case_id, review_decision_id, inbound_envelope_id, canonical_message_id, external_key, callback_batch_ref, mapping_version_id, result, reason_codes, affected_targets, payload_ref, coordination_task_id, received_by, received_at) VALUES ( CAST(#{receiptId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{reviewCaseId} AS uuid), CAST(#{reviewDecisionId} AS uuid), #{inboundEnvelopeId}, #{canonicalMessageId}, #{externalKey}, #{callbackBatchRef}, #{mappingVersionId}, #{result}, CAST(#{reasonCodes} AS jsonb), CAST(#{affectedTargets} AS jsonb), #{payloadRef}, CAST(#{coordinationTaskId} AS uuid), #{receivedBy}, #{receivedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT receipt_id AS "receiptId", project_id AS "projectId", review_case_id AS "reviewCaseId", review_decision_id AS "reviewDecisionId", inbound_envelope_id AS "inboundEnvelopeId", canonical_message_id AS "canonicalMessageId", external_key AS "externalKey", callback_batch_ref AS "callbackBatchRef", mapping_version_id AS "mappingVersionId", result AS "result", reason_codes::text AS "reasonCodes", affected_targets::text AS "affectedTargets", payload_ref AS "payloadRef", coordination_task_id AS "coordinationTaskId", received_by AS "receivedBy", received_at AS "receivedAt" FROM evd_external_review_receipt WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND receipt_id = CAST(#{receiptId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_external_receipt_command_result ( tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key, result_id) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{operationType}, #{idempotencyKey}, CAST(#{resultId} AS uuid)) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
